center.name: 查理斯·沃爾特·德·維斯
center.summary: 查理斯·沃爾特·德·維斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Brown falcon、蓝顶鹛鸫、Yellow-legged flyrobin等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-capped robin (Heteromyias armiti) is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae native to New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|A brown falcon used for falconry in Tasmania The brown falcon (Falco berigora) is a relatively large falcon native to Australia and New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The slaty robin (Melanodryas cyanus), also known as the blue-grey robin, is a species of bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-winged robin (Melanodryas sigillata) is a species of bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-legged flyrobin or yellow-legged flycatcher (Kempiella griseoceps) is a species of passerine bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The mountain firetail (Oreostruthus fuliginosus) is a common species of estrildid finch found in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-capped ifrit (Ifrita kowaldi) is a species of small passerine bird in the monotypic family, Ifritidae, native to the montane rainforests of New Guinea.{{Cite journal |last=Donaghey |first=Richard H

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eastern alpine mannikin (Lonchura monticola) or alpine munia is a species of estrildid finch native to the Papuan Peninsula
